decisions.title_en: Anthropic reverses course, returns Claude Fable 5 to Max/Team Premium at 50% limits, cuts overall limits 33%
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Fresh event 2026-07-20: Fable 5 included in Max/Team Premium at 50% of limits; Pro/Team Standard get usage credits plus a one-time $100 credit; bonus-usage phase ends same day, cutting regular limits 33%; reversal of earlier plan to pull Fable from subscriptions.

decisions.title_en: WAICO formally established: 29 countries sign founding charter, no major Western democracy, Shanghai permanent seat
decisions.reason: Previously published 2026-07-17 as 'Xi keynote pushing to establish WAICO'. New development: the founding charter is now actually signed by 29 governments (Russia, Cuba, Brazil, Venezuela, Pakistan, Indonesia among them; no major Western democracy), Shanghai named permanent seat, Xi pledges 5,000 AI training slots for developing nations. Concrete diplomatic outcome beyond the prior 'called for' framing.

decisions.title_en: AGIBOT debuts four robots at WAIC; A3 Ultra named only embodied-AI 'Gem of the Exhibition'; export push meets China intelligence-law obligation
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Fresh event 2026-07-18: A3 Ultra (1.74m, 60kg, 51 DOF, NVIDIA Thor 700 TOPS, GPS+RTK+UWB), X2 Edu, G2 Max, OmniHand 3 Ultra-M; overseas business >30%; National Intelligence Law angle.

decisions.title_en: BrainCo unveils world's first integrated brain-to-robot R&D platform at WAIC, EEG mind-control in under 200ms
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Fresh event 2026-07-17: non-invasive EEG headset decodes brain signals into robot commands in <200ms; controls arms, humanoids, robot dogs; also Embodied AI Data Collection Solution that records operator EEG.

decisions.title_en: SenseTime's SenseMart Go: humanoid robots autonomously run a retail store at WAIC
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Fresh event 2026-07-18: humanoid robots independently pick products, organize shelves, do inventory and handle exceptions in an operational store.

decisions.title_en: South Korea unveils $880B chips/AI/robotics investment plan
decisions.reason: President Lee announced June 29, 2026; 21 days old, far beyond 5-day limit.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI ships GPT-5.6 Sol/Terra/Luna to the public
decisions.reason: Public rollout July 9, 2026; 11 days old.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI launches ChatGPT Work agent
decisions.reason: Launched July 9, 2026; 11 days old.

decisions.title_en: Apple sues OpenAI over hardware trade-secret theft
decisions.reason: Suit filed July 10, 2026; 10 days old and no substantively new development found in the 07-18/20 window.

decisions.title_en: Chai Discovery raises $400M Series C at $3.8B for AI drug design
decisions.reason: Announced July 14, 2026; 6 days old, just past the 5-day limit.

decisions.title_en: Neura Robotics raises up to $1.4B Series C
decisions.reason: Announced June 10, 2026; far past 5-day limit.

decisions.title_en: Cerebras completes Nasdaq IPO
decisions.reason: IPO completed May 2026; a July 19 recap resurfaced it erroneously. Stale.

decisions.title_en: Meta signs $27B AI infrastructure deal with Nebius
decisions.reason: Disclosed March 16, 2026; far past limit.

decisions.title_en: Anthropic confidentially files draft S-1 for IPO
decisions.reason: Draft S-1 submitted June 1, 2026; far past limit.

decisions.title_en: MiniMax M3 multimodal model (showcased at WAIC)
decisions.reason: M3 launched June 1, 2026; merely showcased at WAIC, not a new release.

decisions.title_en: NVIDIA + ServiceNow launch Project Arc desktop agent
decisions.reason: Announced at Knowledge 2026 in May; a July 19 roundup resurfaced it. Stale.

decisions.title_en: xAI/SpaceX releases Grok 4.5
decisions.reason: Announced July 8, 2026; 12 days old.

decisions.title_en: Altman/Hassabis/Amodei converge on frontier-AI regulation
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-16 (ai-labs-regulation-convergence). No substantively new development in the 07-18/20 window; only rehashes of the three proposals.

decisions.title_en: Moonshot Kimi K3 tops Frontend Code Arena
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-16 (moonshot-kimi-k3). Restated in WAIC coverage with no new facts.

decisions.title_en: Huawei Atlas 950 SuperPoD debuts at WAIC
decisions.reason: Already published 2026-07-17 (huawei-atlas-950-superpod). No new information.
